message:
refactor(mermaid): idiomatic Rust improvements in Gantt parser and navigation

- Replace map_or(true, ...) with is_none_or(...) in navigate_direction
  for clearer intent
- Flatten nested if/if-let into if-let chains for Gantt start_day and
  duration_days parsing, reducing nesting depth
- rustfmt reformatting of to_cell clamp expressions
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
